dataset_name.description: Dataset name as registered in the project data paths and registry.
dataset_name.title: Dataset Name

pipeline.description: Preprocess pipeline to run. This selects the valid schema for pipeline_cfg.
pipeline.title: Pipeline

data_type.description: Dataset data type produced by preprocessing, typically raw or recon.
data_type.title: Data Type

fmt.description: Output data format used for canonical naming and saving templates.
fmt.title: Fmt

pipeline_cfg.description: Pipeline-specific configuration. Editor hints depend on the selected pipeline.
pipeline_cfg.title: Pipeline Cfg

log.description: Options controlling YAML manifest logging for the preprocess run.

split.description: Options controlling optional train, validation, and test split assignment.

data_type.description: Dataset data type produced by preprocessing, typically raw or recon. Allowed for pipeline 'recon_mltpl_snr': recon.
data_type.title: Data Type

fmt.description: Output data format used for canonical naming and saving templates. Allowed for pipeline 'recon_mltpl_snr': mltpl_snr.
fmt.title: Fmt

dump_subfolder.description: Optional subfolder inside the dataset dump/recon directory to read source stacks from.
dump_subfolder.title: Dump Subfolder

combine_subfolders.description: If true, scan the immediate subfolders of the dump root and combine their files into one preprocess stream.
combine_subfolders.title: Combine Subfolders

first_low_inp.description: If true, treat the first frame as a dedicated low-SNR single input and save the remaining frames as the multi-SNR input stack.
first_low_inp.title: First Low Inp

registration.description: If true, rigidly register the stack before generating outputs.
registration.title: Registration

crop_size.description: Optional centered crop size applied to the stack before outputs are extracted.
crop_size.title: Crop Size

gt_types.description: Optional list of ground-truth outputs to create. Allowed values are 'snr0' and 'avg'.
gt_types.title: Gt Types

gt_clip_neg.description: If true, clamp negative values to zero in generated ground-truth outputs.
gt_clip_neg.title: Gt Clip Neg

gt_avg_n_frames.description: Optional number of leading frames to average when creating the gt_avg output. If omitted, all available GT frames are averaged.
gt_avg_n_frames.title: Gt Avg N Frames

pipeline_cfg.title: ReconMltplSnrConfig
pipeline_cfg.description: Pipeline-specific configuration. Editor hints depend on the selected pipeline.

data_type.description: Dataset data type produced by preprocessing, typically raw or recon. Allowed for pipeline 'recon_timelapse_simple': recon.
data_type.title: Data Type

fmt.description: Output data format used for canonical naming and saving templates. Allowed for pipeline 'recon_timelapse_simple': timelapse.
fmt.title: Fmt

dump_subfolder.description: Optional subfolder inside the dataset dump/recon directory to read source timelapses from.
dump_subfolder.title: Dump Subfolder

combine_subfolders.description: If true, scan the immediate subfolders of the dump root and combine their files into one preprocess stream.
combine_subfolders.title: Combine Subfolders

crop_size.description: Optional centered crop size applied to each timelapse frame before saving.
crop_size.title: Crop Size

clip_neg.description: If true, clamp negative pixel values to zero after preprocessing.
clip_neg.title: Clip Neg

remove_first.description: If true, drop the first frame of each timelapse before any other processing.
remove_first.title: Remove First

bleach_correction.description: If true, apply simple-ratio bleach correction to each timelapse stack.
bleach_correction.title: Bleach Correction

pipeline_cfg.title: ReconTimelapseSimpleConfig
pipeline_cfg.description: Pipeline-specific configuration. Editor hints depend on the selected pipeline.

data_type.description: Dataset data type produced by preprocessing, typically raw or recon. Allowed for pipeline 'single_recon': recon.
data_type.title: Data Type

fmt.description: Output data format used for canonical naming and saving templates. Allowed for pipeline 'single_recon': single.
fmt.title: Fmt

dump_subfolder.description: Optional subfolder inside the dataset dump/recon directory to read source images from.
dump_subfolder.title: Dump Subfolder

combine_subfolders.description: If true, scan the immediate subfolders of the dump root and combine their files into one preprocess stream.
combine_subfolders.title: Combine Subfolders

crop_size.description: Optional centered crop size applied to each 2D image before saving.
crop_size.title: Crop Size

pipeline_cfg.title: SingleReconConfig
pipeline_cfg.description: Pipeline-specific configuration. Editor hints depend on the selected pipeline.

enabled.description: Whether to write a YAML preprocess manifest for this run.
enabled.title: Enabled

enabled.description: Whether to assign saved preprocess outputs to train, validation, and test folders.
enabled.title: Enabled

mode.description: Split strategy to use when split.enabled is true: random, manual, or reuse.
mode.title: Mode

manual.description: Parameters for manually selecting validation and test items.

reuse.description: Parameters for reusing split assignments from a previous preprocess manifest.

match_by.description: Identifier style used to match manual split entries against source items. Use source_name for incoming filenames, source_relpath for paths relative to the dump root, or sample_id for generated preprocess names.
match_by.title: Match By

val.description: Items that should be assigned to the validation split.
val.title: Val

test.description: Items that should be assigned to the test split.
test.title: Test

seed.description: Random seed used to shuffle items before assigning validation and test splits.
seed.title: Seed

val_fraction.description: Fraction of source items assigned to the validation split.
val_fraction.title: Val Fraction

test_fraction.description: Fraction of source items assigned to the test split.
test_fraction.title: Test Fraction

manifest_path.description: Optional path to a previous preprocess YAML manifest whose split assignments should be reused.
manifest_path.title: Manifest Path

dataset_name.description: Dataset name of a previous preprocess run to reuse split assignments from.
dataset_name.title: Dataset Name

data_type.description: Data type of the previous preprocess run when reusing a split by dataset name.
data_type.title: Data Type

match_by.description: Identifier style used to match current source items to entries stored in the reused manifest.
match_by.title: Match By
